title: U.S. Circulates Iran Peace Plan While Sending Troops to the Middle East
summary_full: The 2,000 paratroopers heading to the region may give President Trump more leverage in negotiations, but they also leave him with the option of doubling down on military force.
summary_public: The 2,000 paratroopers heading to the region may give President Trump more leverage in negotiations, but they also leave him with the option of doubling down on military force.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S. Circulates Iran Peace Plan While Sending Troops to the Middle East
